title: Building Positive Influence
subtitle: A practical leadership and management workshop for strengthening building positive influence capability at work.
whyThisMatters: Building Positive Influence helps participants turn course concepts into practical workplace habits. The programme gives teams a shared foundation, clearer language, and guided practice so they can connect the subject to clearer leadership behavior, accountability, and team performance and apply the learning with more confidence after the workshop.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.

modules.title: Apply influence principles in the workplace
Module 1: The Principles Of Influence @ Work

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
